name: Rent A Car Simulator 24
short_description: Rent A Car Simulator. Start by renting your first car. Expand your rental car fleet by purchasing different vehicles and grow your car rental business. Drive your cars and get them fixed when they break down. Find new customers. You can also develop your Rent A Car business by playing Co-Op.
detailed_description:
In Rent A Car Simulator 24, you start your car rental business by renting a single car and build a fleet of dozens of luxury cars. Each car will bring you daily income.
Modify and repair cars to earn more.

Check the customer's identification information when renting a car. Don't trust anyone, you will entrust your car to customers. Negotiate with customers.

Get in your car in Co-Op via Steam. Build and develop your Rent A Car office together as a Co-Op. Transfer money between you.

Buy new cars and grow your car rental business.

You can drive your cars and speed up the road with them.

As your income increases, improve yourself and buy a bigger house. Buy new items for your home and office.

Main Features:


  • Renting your cars to customers and tracking their rental status.
  • Conversation screens with customers, system to check your customer's identity information when renting.
  • You can repair and paint your cars.
  • You have a living map. There are in-game characters around with whom you can engage in dialogue.
  • You can buy a house and furnish it with the items you buy.
  • You can build your Rent A Car office in detail.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese, Russian, Turkish, Portuguese - Portugal, Polish, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Ukrainian
